name: Feature Request
about: Propose a user-facing or repository-level improvement
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: ["enhancement", "triage"]
assignees: []
---

## Problem
What problem should this change solve?

## Proposed Change
Describe the desired behavior or repository improvement.

## Acceptance Criteria
List the concrete outcomes that should be true when this is done.

## Additional Context
Add supporting links, screenshots, or technical constraints here.
